Popular raw dog, cat food sold in Illinois, other states recalled for salmonella, listeria NBC 5 Chicago Pet owners should be aware of this incident and take precautions. Affected animals: dogs, cats. Substances or products mentioned: salmonella.

[Read the full report on NBC 5 Chicago →](https://news.google.?oc=5)
